nasb.text: And Joshua wrote these words in the book of the law of God; and he took a large stone and set it up there under the oak that was by the sanctuary of the Lord.

esv.text: And Joshua wrote these words in the Book of the Law of God. And he took a large stone and set it up there under the terebinth that was by the sanctuary of the Lord.

cnv.text: 約書亞把這些話都寫在　神的律法書上；又拿一塊大石頭，立在耶和華聖所旁邊的橡樹下。

ccb.text: 约书亚把这些话都写在上帝的律法书上，又把一块大石头竖立在耶和华圣所旁边的橡树下。
